title: OFCreate
description: This modpack was created for playing on the OnlyFriends Create server.
body:
## RUS
**Этот модпак создан для игры на сервере OnlyFriends Create.** В модпаке есть много аддонов для мода Create и мод Farmer's Delight. Присутствуют аддон Create: Numismatics для валюты на сервере и мод Create: Missions для заработка этой валюты.

Приятной игры!

## ENG
**This modpack was created for playing on the OnlyFriends Create server.** The modpack contains many addons for the Create mod and the Farmer's Delight mod. There is the Create: Numismatics addon for the currency on the server and the Create: Missions mod for earning this currency.

Have a good game!
